steps.title: Weight each question type
steps.content: The question asks for total quiz points, so count the point value contributed by each type, not just the number of questions. Each $1$-point question contributes $1x$ points, and each $2$-point question contributes $2y$ points.

steps.title: Model the total points
steps.content:
The quiz is worth $84$ points total, so add the point contributions.
$$x+2y=84$$
The answer is D.
